issuerType: OCC-regulated national trust bank / trust company
legalStructure: Gold-denominated and gold-backed token managed by Paxos Trust Company, N.A.; PAXG represents fractional ownership of London Good Delivery gold bars held by Paxos Trust on a segregated basis for the benefit of PAXG holders.
targetInvestors: Registered Paxos customers and institutional investors; PAXG is also available through supported secondary-market venues and crypto ecosystem platforms, subject to jurisdictional restrictions.

metadata.fundManagerApplicability: Not applicable; PAXG is a gold-backed token, not a fund.

minimumPurchaseReference.sourceNote: Official Paxos product page compares Pax Gold minimum purchase as 0.01 t oz, approximately $20. Kept out of minimumInvestment because schema does not specify unit.

metadata.custodyStructure: PAXG represents fractional ownership of London Good Delivery gold bars held by Paxos Trust on a segregated basis for PAXG holders.
metadata.reseller: Paxos Global serves as a reseller of PAXG.

regulatoryContext.nydfsAuthorization: NYDFS authorized Paxos Trust Company LLC to offer PAX Gold in 2019.
regulatoryContext.occStatus: OCC conditionally approved Paxos Trust Company, National Association conversion from state trust company to national trust bank in 2025.

jurisdictionNotes: PAXG is currently unavailable in the EU according to the Paxos product page.
Restrictions may apply in accordance with applicable law.
